title: Canada Service Corps – Service Placements National Stream How to apply - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Service Corps – Service Placements National Stream – How to apply
Application period: Closed on December 19, 2023 at 3:00 pm Eastern Time.
- When you'll get a funding decision
Use the Grants and Contributions Online Services (GCOS) to apply.
If you do not have a GCOS account, you are strongly encouraged to create one as soon as possible. You can apply for funding as soon as you register for a GCOS account.
GCOS allows you to apply and track multiple applications online. You can:
- check your application status,
- manage your application,
- submit documents, and
- review past projects submitted through GCOS
To apply through the GCOS system, you'll need to create a GCOS account the first time you use the system. We strongly encourage you to start the one-time GCOS account creation process as soon as possible.
To create a GCOS account, organizations or businesses need to have:
- a Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) business or registration number; and
- the legal and operating name and address of their organization, as registered with the CRA.
Indigenous organizations that don't have a business or registration number can apply by email or mail.

### Confirmation of receipt
If you submit your application through GCOS, you'll receive an acknowledgment and a tracking number immediately.
While we recommend the Grants and Contributions Online Services (GCOS), you can also apply using one of the following options:
To apply by email or by mail, download and complete the application form.
Email your application to EDSC.SJC.OBNAT-NATSP.CSC.ESDC@SERVICECANADA.GC.CA by December 19, 2023, at 3:00 pm Eastern Standard Time (EST).
- Use the following naming convention in your email subject line: "Organization Name – Service Placements National Stream – Application"
- Please note that we can't accept links to cloud or SharePoint versions and password protected applications.
If you submit by email, you'll receive an acknowledgment by email within 14 days of its receipt. We'll send the acknowledgment to the email address provided in your application.
Your application must be postmarked on or before December 19, 2023. You should mail your application to the address applicable to your province or territory from the list below. Note that mail-in applications may face processing delays.
For all provinces and territories
Canada Service Corps Program Coordination Unit Mailstop 402 National Grants & Contributions Delivery Centre (ESDC) 140 Promenade du Portage Phase IV 4th Floor Gatineau QC    K1A 0J9
If you submit your application by mail, you will receive an acknowledgment by email within 14 days of its receipt. We'll send the acknowledgment to the email address provided in your application.
Our application form uses PDF form technology. You must have a PDF reader installed to use the form correctly. There are several readers available on the Internet for free that support our form:
- Adobe Reader (you must use a version of Adobe Reader 8 or higher, for example Adobe Acrobat DC Reader)
If you do not   use the recommended readers (Adobe Acrobat 8 or higher or Foxit Reader), ESDC   may receive a blank application from you.
- Make sure that you have Adobe Acrobat Reader 8 or higher or Foxit Reader installed on your system.
- Select the application form
- When prompted to open or save the form, select the down arrow on the "Save" button, and select "Save as".
- Select your folder location and save (file type must be PDF).
- Reopen the form from your computer: select the "Open with" option choose option to open with either Adobe Acrobat Reader or Foxit
- select the "Open with" option
- choose option to open with either Adobe Acrobat Reader or Foxit
- Make sure that the form opens in one of the reader softwares (Adobe or Foxit), by looking at the top of your screen. For example, you should see: ESDC-EMP 5682.pdf (SECURED) – Adobe Acrobat Reader DC ESDC-EMP 5682.pdf (SECURED) – Foxit PhantomPDF
- ESDC-EMP 5682.pdf (SECURED) – Adobe Acrobat Reader DC
- ESDC-EMP 5682.pdf (SECURED) – Foxit PhantomPDF
- Begin inputting and save your information.
- Before submitting your application make sure that the application form is completed, and all information has saved properly.
To move from one field to the next on the form, hit "Tab". This ensures that you do not accidently skip over any fields.
Some sections of the form perform calculations based on the amounts you enter and will automatically calculate totals in the appropriate fields. You are responsible for the completeness and accuracy of any information submitted. Please double-check all data you enter.

### Submit one application only
Submit only one copy of your application to ESDC. Submitting multiple copies of the same application or submitting the same application by using various methods will cause longer processing times for your application.
Please note that eligible organizations may only submit one application per stream.

## When you'll get a funding decision
We expect to make funding decisions in Fall 2024.
If your project is approved for funding, you should not begin any of the proposed activities or spend any funds for the project at any time before the signing of the Agreement.
If you apply through GCOS, you will be able to track the status of your application throughout the process.
Not all submitted applications will be selected for funding, as funding is limited. Please note that decisions are final and there is no appeal process.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
